gear.XIRANFLOW_STAT.event.description.text: 3-piece set effect: Wearer's ATK +10%. Whenever the wearer consumes Electrification or Corrosion, the wearer gains a number of buff stacks equal to the Status Level of the Arts Reaction consumed, with each buff stack giving Electric DMG Dealt and Nature DMG Dealt +15% for 25s. Max 3 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

gear.XIRANFLOW_STAT.status.XIRANFLOW.eve.text: Electric and Nature DMG +15% per stack for 25s after consuming Electrification or Corrosion. Max 3 stacks.
